cases.input: Design a REST API for a blog platform with users, posts, and comments
cases.expect: Complete OpenAPI 3.1 spec with resources, pagination, errors, auth

cases.input: Create an OpenAPI spec for our e-commerce checkout API
cases.expect: OpenAPI 3.1 YAML with paths, schemas, security, mock instructions

cases.input: We need to make breaking changes to our API. How should we handle versioning?
cases.expect: URL path versioning, deprecation headers, Sunset, grace period

cases.input: How should I implement rate limiting for my public API?
cases.expect: Tiered limits, 429 response with Retry-After, RFC 7807 error format

cases.description: Should trigger: GraphQL schema alongside REST
cases.input: I want to offer both REST and GraphQL for my product catalog API
cases.expect: Cross-protocol consistency, Relay cursor connections, same naming

cases.input: What's the best way to paginate my /users endpoint that has millions of records?
cases.expect: Cursor-based pagination, encoded cursors, hasMore, max limit

cases.description: Should NOT trigger: frontend UI question
cases.input: How do I style a dropdown menu in Tailwind CSS?

cases.description: Should NOT trigger: database query optimization
cases.input: My PostgreSQL query is slow. How do I add an index?
